title: sorghastrum minarum
intro: Sorghastrum minarum, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Sorghastrum minarum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Sorghastrum minarum can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
